name: the unborn child
identity: The fourth child growing within the player character, representing the continuity of life and the harmony of the tribe. It acts as an internal compass, subtly aligning with the broader patterns of the Quiet Weave.
current_status: Growing strong and steady within the player character during the deep winter. The life within acts as an internal compass, aligning the player's insights with the energetic flows of the world.

volatile_state.current_activity: Developing during the deep winter, enhancing the player's perception of subtle energetic flows

notes: Previously conflated with Lyrawyn in the catalog; this turn clarifies the entity is the player's fourth child.
